hero.designNotes: Minimal-elegant Gujarati Hindu hero built entirely from CSS decorative elements — no external images required. The tri-column layout features living toran leaf strands and animated diya flames flanking a typographic centerpiece. A slowly rotating SVG mandala wraps the ampersand between the two names, set in large italic Cormorant Garamond with a warm amber gradient. The warm cream-and-gold palette (#fdf8f1, #c9a96e, #2c1f0e) references kankotri and marigold traditions without being overly ornate. A shimmer-animated date pill, a Gujarati script accent line ("સ્નેહ અને આશીર્વાદ સાથે" — With love and blessings), a floating-blob marigold radial gradient, and a grain texture overlay add depth and premium feel. On mobile the side columns collapse gracefully, keeping all key content centred and legible.
